content: # **2026-03-25 WEEKLY REPORT** ## Blog Posts * **Status**: * **2026-03-19** - [Status v2\.37: More control over your digital footprint, view on\-chain friends, Linea support, Keycard & dApps on mobile, smart QR code scan, and more](https://status.app/blog/status-v2-37-more-control-over-your-digital-footprint-view-on-chain-friends-linea-support-keycard-dapps-on-mobile-smart-qr-code-scan-and-more) _Release Roundup Status v2\.37 brings you: \* More control over your digi..._ * **2026-03-19** - [Status v2\.37 is out\!](https://status.app/blog/status-v2-37-is-out) _Bringing you the more control over your digital footprint, view on\-cha..._ * **2026-03-19** - [Status Communities Get Reliable Messaging with the SDS Protocol](https://status.app/blog/status-communities-get-reliable-messaging-with-the-sds-protocol) _What is the SDS Protocol? SDS stands for Scalable Data Sync \- a protoc..._ * **2026-03-23** - [Introducing Bermuda: The Composable Privacy Layer of Status Network](https://status.app/blog/introducing-bermuda-the-composable-privacy-layer-of-status-network) _Status Network is the first reputation\-based L2 designed for humans an..._ * **Keycard**: * **2026-03-20** - [A Keycard Manifesto](https://keycard.tech/blog/a-keycard-manifesto) _\(This is a repost of We need sovereign tools: a Keycard Manifesto post..._ * **Logos**: * **2026-03-18** - [The Secret to Sovereign Zone Interoperability on Logos](https://press.logos.co/article/sovereign-zone-interoperability) _Discover how Mantle channels connect Sovereign Zones with atomic tr..._ ## Forum Posts * **Logos**: * **2026-03-22** - Circles - [Logos Circle Ruse #2](https://forum.logos.co/t/logos-circle-ruse-2/1571/1) * **2026-03-23** - Tech - [Progressive Depletion Minting: a formally verified supply control mechanism, free for personal use and community projects](https://forum.logos.co/t/progressive-depletion-minting-a-formally-verified-supply-control-mechanism-free-for-personal-use-and-community-projects/1574/1) ## YouTube Videos **2026-03-21** - Testnet v0.1 & Logos Basecamp Updates **2026-03-24** - Logos Circle: Online - March 24, 2026 **2026-03-19** - The Redistribution of Sovereignty ## Releases * **Logos**: * **2026-03-19** logos-delivery - [v0.37.2](https://github.com/logos-messaging/logos-delivery/releases/tag/v0.37.2) * **2026-03-18** logos-storage-go-bindings - [v0.3.2](https://github.com/logos-storage/logos-storage-go-bindings/releases/tag/v0.3.2) * **Vac**: * **2026-03-19** zerokit - [v2.0.0](https://github.com/vacp2p/zerokit/releases/tag/v2.0.0)
